summary: Plan-mode classification only. #90835 remains the best live canonical for the App Store availability confusion on /platforms/ios. #91277 is a narrow related candidate fix, but it should not be merged or used for fixed-by-candidate closeout in this run because merge/fix actions are blocked by the job and the PR has a failing Real behavior proof check. Linked #90599 is related iOS install-path documentation work with a broader beta-capacity/support-path scope, not a duplicate of #90835.
